originalTitle: The AI rotation stole the spotlight from a strong start to earnings season
summary: The AI trade dominated the market once again this week, upstaging an impressive start to the second-quarter earnings season.
content: The AI trade dominated the market once again this week, upstaging an impressive start to the second-quarter earnings season.
chineseTitle: 财报季开局强劲，AI 轮换成为众人瞩目的焦点
chineseSummary: 本周，人工智能交易再次主导市场，抢走了第二季度财报季的良好开局。
chineseContent: 本周，人工智能交易再次主导市场，抢走了第二季度财报季的良好开局。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
